particulars.description: L/H farm situated at north petherton in the county of somerset; together with all buildings and fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant and machinery thereon. By way of assignment the goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences and all guarantees. By way of fixed charge the shares and all rights, benefits and advantages arising in respect thereof. By way of assignment the intellectual property rights.
